function getFlavor(category, name) {
    const list = FLAVOR_TEXTS[category] || ["Бросок совершен."];
    const text = list[Math.floor(Math.random() * list.length)];
    return text.replace("{n}", `<b style="color:white">${name}</b>`);
}

// === 2. ВСПОМОГАТЕЛЬНЫЕ ФУНКЦИИ ===
async function getDartModifierForPC(actor) {
    if (!actor || actor.type !== "character") return 0;
    try {
        const dartSource = await fromUuid(DART_UUID);
        if (!dartSource) return 0;
        const [tempItem] = await actor.createEmbeddedDocuments("Item", [dartSource.toObject()], { renderSheet: false, temporary: false });
        const strike = actor.system.actions?.find(a => a.item?.id === tempItem.id);
        const finalMod = strike?.totalModifier || 0;
        await tempItem.delete();
        return finalMod;
    } catch (e) { return 0; }
}

function calculateStaticMods(actor, pData) {
    if (!actor) return { atk: 0, per: 0, thi: 0, lore: 0 };
    const isNPC = actor.type === "npc";
    const sys = actor.system;
    const level = sys.details?.level?.value || 0;
    const intMod = sys.abilities?.int?.mod || 0;
    const dexMod = sys.abilities?.dex?.mod || 0;
    let loreMod = intMod;
    const loreGames = actor.items.find(i => i.type === "lore" && (i.name.toLowerCase().includes('game') || i.name.toLowerCase().includes('игра')));
    if (loreGames) {
        if (isNPC) loreMod = loreGames.system.mod?.value || intMod;
        else {
            const rank = loreGames.system.proficient?.value || 0;
            loreMod = (rank > 0) ? (rank * 2 + level + intMod) : intMod;
        }
    }
    if (isNPC) {
        const strikes = actor.items.filter(i => i.type === "melee");
        const bonuses = strikes.map(s => s.system.bonus?.value || 0);
        return { atk: bonuses.length > 0 ? Math.min(...bonuses) : (level + 2 + dexMod), per: sys.perception?.mod || 0, thi: sys.skills?.thievery?.base || 0, lore: loreMod };
    } else {
        return { atk: pData.cachedAtk || 0, per: actor.perception?.mod || 0, thi: actor.skills?.thievery?.mod || 0, lore: loreMod };
    }
}

// === 3. ЯДРО ОБРАБОТКИ (GM) ===
window.devilsPinProcessAction = async function(actionData) {
    if (!game.user.isGM) return;
    let rawState = canvas.scene.getFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY);
    let state = foundry.utils.deepClone(rawState || { players: {}, phase: 'join', round: 1, log: [], debugMode: false });
    let changed = false;

    if (actionData.action === "toggleJoin") {
        if (state.players[actionData.actorId]) { state.players[actionData.actorId].isParticipating = actionData.isParticipating; changed = true; }
    } 
    else if (actionData.action === "refreshAtk") {
        const actor = game.actors.get(actionData.actorId);
        if (actor) { state.players[actionData.actorId].cachedAtk = await getDartModifierForPC(actor); changed = true; }
    }
    else if (actionData.action === "setSkill") {
        if (state.players[actionData.actorId]) { state.players[actionData.actorId].selectedSkill = actionData.skill; changed = true; }
    }
    else if (actionData.action === "throw") {
        await processThrowLogic(state, actionData.actorId, actionData.target);
        changed = true;
    }
    else if (actionData.action === "pay") {
        await executePayment(state, actionData);
        changed = true;
    }
    else if (actionData.action === "resetRound") {
        state.phase = 'join'; state.round = 1; state.log = ["--- Журнал очищен ---"]; state.results = null;
        for (let id in state.players) {
            state.players[id].debt = 10; state.players[id].hasThrown = false; state.players[id].hasPaid = false;
            state.players[id].lastSkill = ""; state.players[id].lastTarget = ""; state.players[id].selectedSkill = "";
        }
        changed = true;
    }

    if (changed) { state.syncToken = Date.now(); await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, state); }
};

async function executePayment(state, data) {
    const payer = game.actors.get(data.actorId);
    if (!payer) return;
    if (payer.type === "character") await payer.inventory.removeCoins({ sp: data.amount });
    state.log.unshift(`<div style="padding:4px; border:1px solid gold; background:rgba(255,215,0,0.1); border-radius:4px; margin-bottom:4px; font-size:11px;">💰 <b>${payer.name}</b> выплатил <b>${data.amount} СМ</b>.</div>`);
    const winnersIds = state.results?.winners || [];
    for (let wid of winnersIds) {
        const winActor = game.actors.get(wid);
        if (winActor?.type === "character") {
            const share = Math.floor(data.amount / winnersIds.length);
            if (share > 0) await winActor.inventory.addCoins({ sp: share });
        }
    }
    state.players[data.actorId].hasPaid = true;
}

async function processThrowLogic(state, actorId, targetKey) {
    const targets = { tongue: { name: "Язык", dc: 15, pts: 1 }, nose: { name: "Нос", dc: 20, pts: 2 }, horns: { name: "Рога", dc: 25, pts: 3 } };
    const skillNames = { atk: "Атака", per: "Воспр.", thi: "Воров.", lore: "Игра" };
    let p = state.players[actorId];
    let skillKey = p.selectedSkill;
    let target = targets[targetKey];
    let actor = game.actors.get(actorId);
    let mods = calculateStaticMods(actor, p);
    let mod = mods[skillKey];
    let roll = await new Roll("1d20 + @mod", {mod}).evaluate({async:true});
    let d20 = roll.dice[0].total; let total = roll.total;

    let res = 2; // Провал
    if (total >= target.dc + 10) res = 4; else if (total >= target.dc) res = 3; else if (total <= target.dc - 10) res = 1;
    if (d20 === 20) res = Math.min(res + 1, 4); if (d20 === 1) res = Math.max(res - 1, 1);

    let oldD = p.debt; let bTxt = ""; let bCol = ""; let fCat = "success"; let lSt = "";
    if (d20 === 20 && total >= target.dc + 10) { p.debt = Math.max(0, Math.floor(p.debt / 2) - (target.pts * 2)); bTxt = "UBER КРИТ"; bCol = "#ffaa00"; fCat = "uber_crit"; lSt = "background:rgba(90,74,0,0.3); border:1px solid gold; color:#ffcc00;"; }
    else if (res === 4) { p.debt = Math.max(0, Math.floor(p.debt / 2) - target.pts); bTxt = "КРИТ. УСПЕХ"; bCol = "#2ecc71"; fCat = "crit"; lSt = "background:rgba(46,204,113,0.15); border-left:4px solid #2ecc71;"; }
    else if (res === 3) { p.debt = Math.max(0, p.debt - target.pts); bTxt = "УСПЕХ"; bCol = "#27ae60"; fCat = "success"; lSt = "background:rgba(39,174,96,0.1); border-left:3px solid #27ae60;"; }
    else if (res === 2) { p.debt += target.pts; bTxt = "ПРОВАЛ"; bCol = "#e67e22"; fCat = "fail"; lSt = "background:rgba(230,126,34,0.1); border-left:3px solid #e67e22;"; }
    else if (d20 === 1 && total <= target.dc - 10) { p.debt = (p.debt * 2) + (target.pts * 2); bTxt = "UBER ПРОМАХ"; bCol = "#9b59b6"; fCat = "uber_fail"; lSt = "background:rgba(68,0,68,0.3); border:1px solid #9b59b6; color:#d689ff;"; }
    else { p.debt = (p.debt * 2) + target.pts; bTxt = "КРИТ. ПРОВАЛ"; bCol = "#c0392b"; fCat = "crit_fail"; lSt = "background:rgba(192,57,43,0.2); border-left:4px solid #c0392b;"; }

    const diff = p.debt - oldD;
    const cTag = diff < 0 ? `<b style="color:#2ecc71">${diff} СМ</b>` : `<b style="color:#e74c3c">+${diff} СМ</b>`;
    state.log.unshift(`<div style="padding:6px; margin-bottom:5px; border-radius:4px; ${lSt}"><div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:3px;"><span style="background:${bCol}; color:black; padding:1px 6px; border-radius:3px; font-weight:bold; font-size:10px;">${bTxt}</span><span style="opacity:0.7; font-size:10px;">[${d20}+${mod}=${total} vs КС${target.dc}]</span></div><div style="line-height:1.2;">${getFlavor(fCat, p.name)}</div><div style="font-size:10px; margin-top:3px; border-top:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-top:2px;">Долг: ${oldD} ➔ <b>${p.debt}</b> (${cTag})</div></div>`);

    p.hasThrown = true; p.lastSkill = skillKey; p.lastTarget = targetKey;

    let active = Object.values(state.players).filter(pl => pl.isParticipating);
    if (active.every(pl => pl.hasThrown)) {
        if (state.round >= 3 || active.some(pl => pl.debt === 0)) {
            state.phase = 'results';
            let minD = Math.min(...active.map(p => p.debt));
            let winners = active.filter(p => p.debt === minD);
            let winnersIds = winners.map(w => Object.keys(state.players).find(k => state.players[k].name === w.name));
            state.results = { winners: winnersIds, totalPot: active.filter(p => p.debt > minD).reduce((s, l) => s + l.debt, 0) };
            state.log.unshift(`<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg, #1e4d2b, #28a745, #1e4d2b); border:2px solid gold; padding:10px; border-radius:5px; color:white; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:13px;">🏆 ПОБЕДА: ${winners.map(w=>w.name).join(" и ")}! Выигрыш: ${state.results.totalPot} СМ</div>`);
        } else {
            state.round += 1;
            for (let id in state.players) { if (state.players[id].isParticipating) { state.players[id].hasThrown = false; state.players[id].selectedSkill = ""; } }
            // Добавляем разделитель в лог
            state.log.unshift(`<div style="text-align:center; background:#4a0000; color:#ffaa00; font-weight:bold; padding:4px; margin:10px 0; border:1px solid #ffaa00; border-radius:4px; box-shadow:0 0 5px black; font-size:12px;">🛡️ РАУНД ${state.round} 🛡️</div>`);
        }
    }
}

class DevilsPinGame extends Application {
  static get defaultOptions() { return mergeObject(super.defaultOptions, { id: "devils-pin-window", title: "Дьявольская Булавка", width: 1380, height: 820, resizable: true, dragDrop: [{ dropSelector: "#devils-pin-app" }] }); }
  async _renderInner(data) {
    Handlebars.registerHelper('eq', (a, b) => a === b); Handlebars.registerHelper('and', (a, b) => a && b);
    Handlebars.registerHelper('or', (a, b) => a || b); Handlebars.registerHelper('not', (a) => !a);
    Handlebars.registerHelper('gte', (a, b) => a >= b);
    return $(style + Handlebars.compile(template)(data));
  }
  _getState() { return canvas.scene.getFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY) || { players: {}, phase: 'join', round: 1, log: [], debugMode: false }; }
  getData() {
    const state = this._getState(); const playersData = {};
    for (let [id, p] of Object.entries(state.players)) {
        let actor = game.actors.get(id);
        const isWinner = (state.results?.winners || []).includes(id);
        playersData[id] = { ...p, type: actor?.type, isActorOwner: actor?.isOwner, isVisualOwner: actor?.isOwner && (!game.user.isGM || actor.type === 'npc'), isWinner, mods: calculateStaticMods(actor, p) };
    }
    return { state, players: playersData, isGM: game.user.isGM, isPlaying: state.phase === 'playing', isJoinPhase: state.phase === 'join', isResultsPhase: state.phase === 'results' };
  }
  _animateDart(actorId) {
    const actor = game.actors.get(actorId);
    const user = game.users.find(u => u.active && (u.character?.id === actorId || actor?.testUserPermission(u, "OWNER")));
    const color = user?.color || "#ff4400";
    const card = this.element.find(`[data-actor-card="${actorId}"]`);
    const log = this.element.find("#dp-log-area");
    if (!card.length || !log.length) return;
    const start = card.offset(); const end = log.offset();
    const dart = $(`<div class="dp-dart-fx" style="--color: ${color}"></div>`).appendTo('body');
    dart.css({ top: start.top + 20, left: start.left + 50 });
    setTimeout(() => { dart.css({ top: end.top + 50, left: end.left + 20, opacity: 0, transform: 'scale(0.3) rotate(45deg)' }); }, 50);
    setTimeout(() => { dart.remove(); }, 750);
  }

  _showDetailedRules() {
      new Dialog({

            <p><b>Дьявольская Булавка</b> — азартная игра на меткость, популярная в неблагополучных районах и среди тех, кто не боится «адских» контрактов. Используется настенная мишень с ликом дьявола.</p>
            
            <h3 style="color:#900; margin-top:15px;">1. ПОДГОТОВКА И ЦЕЛЬ</h3>
            <ul>
                <li>Каждый игрок начинает с <b>Адским долгом в 10 очков</b>.</li>
                <li><b>Цель:</b> Снизить долг до <b>0</b>.</li>
                <li>Партия длится ровно <b>3 раунда</b> или до момента, когда кто-то достигнет нуля.</li>

            <h3 style="color:#900;">2. ПРАВИЛА БРОСКА</h3>
            <p>Игрок стоит в 10 футах от мишени. В свой ход он объявляет цель:</p>
            <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:12px;">
                <tr style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"><td>👅 <b>Язык</b></td><td>КС 15</td><td>-1 очко</td></tr>
                <tr><td>👃 <b>Нос</b></td><td>КС 20</td><td>-2 очка</td></tr>
                <tr style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"><td>🤘 <b>Рога</b></td><td>КС 25</td><td>-3 очка</td></tr>
            </table>

            <h3 style="color:#900; margin-top:15px;">3. СТЕПЕНИ УСПЕХА (Математика Ада)</h3>
            <p style="font-size:12px;">Игра использует систему степеней успеха PF2e (Крит = ±10 от КС). Натуральные 20 и 1 сдвигают степень успеха.</p>
            <ul style="font-size:12px;">
                <li>🌟 <b>Nat 20 Uber:</b> Если d20 выпало 20 и бросок <i>и без того</i> был бы Критом. Долг уменьшается <b>в половину</b> и еще <b>минус (очки * 2)</b>.</li>
                <li>🎯 <b>Критический успех:</b> Долг <b>делится на 2</b> и вычитаются очки цели.</li>
                <li>✅ <b>Успех:</b> Вычитаются очки цели из долга.</li>
                <li>❌ <b>Провал:</b> Очки цели <b>прибавляются</b> к долгу.</li>
                <li>⚠️ <b>Критический провал:</b> Долг <b>удваивается</b> и прибавляются очки цели.</li>
                <li>💀 <b>Nat 1 Uber:</b> Если d20 выпало 1 и бросок <i>и так</i> был бы Крит. Провалом. Долг <b>удваивается</b> и прибавляются <b>(очки * 2)</b>.</li>
            </ul>

            <h3 style="color:#900;">4. ЖЕСТКИЕ ОГРАНИЧЕНИЯ</h3>
            <ul>
                <li><b>Проклятие Повтора:</b> Нельзя использовать один и тот же навык (например, Атаку) два раза подряд.</li>
                <li><b>Смена Цели:</b> Нельзя метить в одну и ту же часть лица (например, в Нос) два раунда подряд.</li>
                <li><b>Снаряжение:</b> Используются стандартные дротики (Простое метательное оружие, модификатор Ловкости).</li>
            </ul>

            <h3 style="color:#900;">5. ВЫИГРЫШ И НИЧЬЯ</h3>
            <p>Победителем считается тот, у кого в конце 3-го раунда <b>наименьший долг</b>. Победитель забирает общую сумму серебра, равную остаткам долгов всех проигравших. При ничьей (равный мин. долг) победители <b>делят общую кассу поровну</b>.</p>
          </div>`,
          buttons: { ok: { label: "Да начнется игра!" } }
      }, { width: 500 }).render(true);
  }

  activateListeners(html) {
    super.activateListeners(html);
    html.find('.dp-rules-help').click(() => this._showDetailedRules());
    html.find('.dp-join-cb').change(ev => this._sendAction({ action: "toggleJoin", actorId: ev.currentTarget.dataset.actor, isParticipating: ev.currentTarget.checked }));
    html.find('.dp-skill-btn').click(ev => {
        if ($(ev.currentTarget).hasClass('forbidden')) return;
        this._sendAction({ action: "setSkill", actorId: ev.currentTarget.dataset.actor, skill: ev.currentTarget.dataset.skill });
    });
    html.find('.dp-target-btn').click(ev => { 
        if ($(ev.currentTarget).hasClass('forbidden')) return;
        const actorId = ev.currentTarget.dataset.actor; const state = this._getState(); const p = state.players[actorId];
        if (!p.selectedSkill) return ui.notifications.warn("Выберите навык и цель!");
        this._animateDart(actorId); this._sendAction({ action: "throw", actorId: actorId, target: ev.currentTarget.dataset.target }); 
    });
    html.find('.dp-refresh-btn').click(ev => this._sendAction({ action: "refreshAtk", actorId: ev.currentTarget.dataset.actor }));
    html.find('.dp-pay-btn').click(ev => { if ($(ev.currentTarget).hasClass('paid')) return; this._sendAction({ action: "pay", actorId: ev.currentTarget.dataset.actor, amount: parseInt(ev.currentTarget.dataset.amount) }); });
    if (game.user.isGM) {
        html.find('#dp-start-game').click(async () => { let s = this._getState(); s.phase = 'playing'; s.log.unshift("--- ПАРТИЯ НАЧАТА ---"); await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, s); });
        html.find('#dp-reset-round').click(() => this._sendAction({ action: "resetRound" }));
        html.find('#dp-reset-full').click(async () => { await canvas.scene.unsetFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY); await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, { players: {}, phase: 'join', round: 1, log: [], syncToken: Date.now() }); });
        html.find('#dp-debug-mode').change(async (ev) => { let s = this._getState(); s.debugMode = ev.currentTarget.checked; await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, s); });
        html.find('.dp-remove-btn').click(async (ev) => { let id = ev.currentTarget.dataset.actor; let s = this._getState(); delete s.players[id]; s.players[`-=${id}`] = null; await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, s); });
    }
  }
  async _onDrop(event) {
    if (!game.user.isGM) return;
    const data = TextEditor.getDragEventData(event); if (data.type !== "Actor") return;
    let mainActor = await fromUuid(data.uuid); if (!mainActor) return;
    let state = this._getState();
    let actorsToAdd = mainActor.type === "party" ? mainActor.members.filter(m => m.type === "character") : [mainActor];
    for (let actor of actorsToAdd) {
        if (state.players[actor.id]) continue;
        let atkMod = 0; if (actor.type === "character") atkMod = await getDartModifierForPC(actor);
        state.players[actor.id] = { name: actor.name, img: actor.img, debt: 10, isParticipating: actor.type === 'npc', hasThrown: false, selectedSkill: "", cachedAtk: atkMod, lastSkill: "", lastTarget: "", hasPaid: false };
    }
    await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, state);
  }
  async _sendAction(data) {
    if (game.user.isGM) await window.devilsPinProcessAction(data);
    else await game.user.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_ACTION, { ...data, ts: Date.now() });
  }
}

if (!window.devilsPinHookV31) {
    Hooks.on("updateUser", async (user, changes) => {
        if (!game.user.isGM) return;
        let flags = changes.flags?.[FLAG_SCOPE]; if (flags && flags[FLAG_ACTION]) { await window.devilsPinProcessAction(flags[FLAG_ACTION]); await user.unsetFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_ACTION); }
    });
    window.devilsPinHookV31 = true;
}
Hooks.on("updateScene", (scene, data) => {
    if (data.flags?.[FLAG_SCOPE]?.[FLAG_KEY] !== undefined) {
        let app = Object.values(ui.windows).find(w => w.id === "devils-pin-window");
        if (app) app.render(false);
        else if (data.flags[FLAG_SCOPE][FLAG_KEY].openSignal) new DevilsPinGame().render(true);
    }
});
if (game.user.isGM) {
    let s = canvas.scene.getFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY) || { players: {}, phase: 'join', round: 1, log: [], debugMode: false };
    s.openSignal = Date.now(); canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, s);
}
let existing = Object.values(ui.windows).find(w => w.id === "devils-pin-window");
if (existing && existing.rendered && existing.element.length > 0) existing.bringToTop();
else new DevilsPinGame().render(true);
